name: Jam and Toast
description: House-made jam and grilled country toast.
notes: (V). Sub gluten-free toast $3. Jam choices: strawberry vanilla balsamic, rosemary peach, huckleberry ($2 upcharge).

name: Mini House-Made Cinnamon Rolls
description: (1) or (3) freshly baked cinnamon rolls topped with caramel and toasted pecans.

name: Stuffed French Toast
description: House-made brioche bread, stuffed with our jam infused mascarpone cream cheese. Topped with toasted almonds, house-made icing, honey butter, and powdered sugar.

name: Breakfast Board
description: Cold-smoked salmon over country toast, served with chopped house-pickled veggies, soft-boiled eggs, slices of grilled country toast, house-made jam, and honey butter.

name: OG Biscuit & Gravy
description: House-made buttermilk biscuit topped with sausage gravy.

name: Avocado Toast
description: House-made guacamole, country toast, bacon lardons, roasted grape tomatoes, and 1 basted egg.

name: Cinnamon Roll Pancake
description: Cinnamon chip buttermilk pancake topped with cinnamon buttercream, caramel sauce, royal vanilla icing, and powdered sugar.

name: Blueberry Ricotta Pancake
description: Buttermilk pancake topped with blueberry jam/sauce, blueberries, lemon-ricotta mascarpone, toasted almonds, and powdered sugar.

name: Peanut Butter Cup Pancake
description: Chocolate chip buttermilk pancake topped with whipped peanut butter sauce and honey butter, garnished with powdered sugar.

name: Banana Bread Crunch Pancake
description: Buttermilk pancake topped with bananas, caramel sauce, cinnamon butter, and our house-made granola, garnished with powdered sugar.
notes: (V). Granola contains nuts and is NOT gluten-free. If (GF) sub gluten-free pancake $2 and bowl of granola.

name: Coconut Banana Pancake
description: Gluten-free flour, ground flax, coconut and almond milk pancake, topped with toasted coconut, sliced bananas, honey, and powdered sugar.

name: Strawberry Shortcake Pancake
description: Buttermilk pancake topped with fresh strawberries, jam-infused mascarpone, strawberry gastrique, house-made shortcake crumble, and powdered sugar.

name: Plain Pancake
description: Classic buttermilk pancake served plain or with your choice of topping. Topped with butter, served with house-made syrup.

name: Pancake Flight
description: Any three pancakes of your choice.

name: Optional Pancake Toppings
description: 12 optional pancake toppings.
notes: Any pancake style can be made gluten-free (remember granola is NOT GF for the Banana Bread Crunch).

name: Biscuits & Gravy
description: House-made buttermilk biscuits and sausage gravy, topped with chopped bacon and 2 basted eggs, served with hashbrowns and citrus arugula.

name: A.M. Aussie
description: 2 soft poached eggs, toast, and avocado. Served with walnut-herb pesto and citrus arugula.

name: Red Chili & Corned Beef Hash
description: Slow-cooked Bourbon Amber-braised Black Angus Choice corned beef in a moderately spiced hash, topped with 2 soft poached eggs, served with citrus arugula and house-made grilled country toast.

name: Breakfast Sammie
description: Basted egg, sausage patty, fumella, chopped bacon, and citrus arugula on a local English muffin. Served with hashbrowns.
notes: If (GF) sub local gluten-free English muffin $3.

name: Roasted Beet & Root Hash
description: Roasted red and golden beets, heirloom potato medley, seasonal mushrooms, and house-made spiced italian sausage on a layer of citrus arugula and house-made grilled country toast, served with 2 soft poached eggs.
notes: (V option without sausage). If (GF) sub gluten-free toast $3.

name: Loaded Hash Browns
description: 2 basted eggs atop hash browns, chopped bacon, grilled fresh jalapenos, smoked mozzarella cheese, and sausage gravy, served with citrus arugula and house-made grilled country toast.
notes: If (GF) sub gluten-free toast $3, no gravy.

name: Huevos Rancheros
description: Trevino's (local Billings) corn flour tortillas, refried black beans, smoked mozzarella, chili verde, 2 basted eggs, ranchero sauce, cilantro lime crema, pico de gallo, and cotija cheese. Served with citrus arugula and hashbrowns.

name: Breakfast Burrito
description: Refried black beans, scrambled eggs, hash browns, sausage gravy, smoked pork shoulder, and pork chili verde rolled in a flour tortilla, topped with cilantro lime crema, pico de gallo, and cotija cheese. Served with citrus arugula.

name: Traditional
description: 2 eggs served your way, 2 slices of slab bacon, hash browns, and house-made grilled country toast.

name: Grazi's Granola
description: Almonds, walnuts, rolled oats, dried Montana fruit, and toasted coconut. Served with fresh berries and whole milk.
notes: (V). Sub soy, almond, coconut, or oat milk $1.50. Add Greek plain yogurt $4.

name: Basic Benedict
description: Seared maple-glazed ham on local English muffins, 2 poached easy eggs and hollandaise, served with hashbrowns and citrus arugula.
notes: Available half or full. If (GF) sub local gluten-free English muffin $2 / $3.50.

name: Chicken & Biscuit Benedict
description: Cornmeal-crusted buttermilk fried chicken breast, house-made buttermilk biscuits, maple syrup, sausage gravy, Tabasco, and microgreen leeks. 2 soft poached eggs and hollandaise. Served with citrus arugula and hashbrowns.
notes: If (GF) sub local gluten-free English muffin $2 / $3.50, no gravy.

name: Crab Cake Benedict
description: Fried lump crab cakes, guacamole, English muffins, 2 poached easy eggs, hollandaise, and microgreen leeks. Served with citrus arugula and hashbrowns.
notes: If (GF) sub local gluten-free English muffin $2 / $3.50.

name: Mia Benedict
description: House-made grilled country toast, roasted roma tomato, fresh mozzarella, balsamic reduction, and microgreen basil, 2 soft poached eggs and hollandaise, served with citrus arugula and hashbrowns.
notes: (V). If (GF) add gluten-free toast $2/$3. Great upsell — add prosciutto $3 or avocado $3.75.

name: Benedict Substitutions
description: Allowed substitutions on benedicts: egg for avocado; bacon for sausage; avocado for meat (bacon or sausage).
notes: Any other substitutions are an ADD price. If customer becomes upset, see manager.

name: Pulled Pork Omelet
description: Four-egg omelet with smoked pork shoulder, smoked mozzarella and cotija cheese, pork chili verde, pico de gallo, and cilantro lime crema. Served with citrus arugula and hashbrowns.

name: Roasted Vegetable Omelet
description: Four-egg omelet with roasted seasonal mushrooms, spinach, fresh heirloom grape tomatoes, caramelized onion, chevre, and walnut-herb pesto. Served with hashbrowns and citrus arugula.

name: Ham and Swiss Omelet
description: Four-egg omelet with applewood smoked ham, caramelized onions, and Swiss cheese. Topped with house-made hollandaise and microgreen leeks. Served with hashbrowns and citrus arugula.

name: What is Chevre?
description: Goat cheese.
notes: Used in the Roasted Vegetable Omelet.

name: What is Fumella?
description: All-natural smoked mozzarella, free of preservatives and fillers.

name: House Salad
description: Spicy mixed greens, grape tomatoes, and house-made croutons in a citrus vinaigrette.
notes: (V). Great upsell — add pulled pork, Philly meat, or chicken Philly meat.

name: Kobb Salad
description: Mixed greens, avocado, grape tomatoes, chopped bacon, hard-boiled egg, and house-made croutons. Served with our signature ranch dressing.
notes: Great upsell — add pulled pork, Philly meat, or chicken Philly meat.

name: Soup of the Day
description: Roasted Tomato and Basil.

name: Grilled Cheese
description: House-made country bread with American and Jack cheese.
notes: (V). Served with French fries, house salad, or a cup of soup ($2).

name: BLT
description: Slab bacon, tomato, basil, and arugula on our house-made country toast.
notes: Served with French fries, house salad, or cup of soup ($2).

name: Philly Cheesesteak
description: 8oz shaved ribeye, provolone and American cheese, and onions on a house-made hoagie roll.
notes: Served with French fries, house salad, or a cup of soup ($2).

name: Chicken Philly Cheesesteak
description: 8oz shaved chicken breast, provolone and American cheese, and onions on a house-made hoagie roll.
notes: Served with French fries, house salad, or cup of soup ($2).

name: Pulled Pork Tacos
description: Two local corn-flour tortillas, house-smoked pulled pork, green chili verde, jack cheese, cilantro lime crema, and pico de gallo.
notes: Can be (GF) with GF tortillas ($1). Served with French fries, house salad, or cup of soup ($2).

name: Margherita
description: 6oz shaved chicken breast, fresh mozzarella, oven-roasted tomatoes, herbed olive oil, basil pesto, and balsamic reduction (cold).
notes: Pesto contains parmesan cheese. Served with French fries (fried in beef tallow), house salad, or cup of soup.

name: Gamecock
description: 8oz shaved ribeye, provolone and American cheese, applewood bacon, onions, and grilled jalapenos.
notes: Served with French fries, house salad, or a cup of soup ($2).

name: Cubano
description: House-smoked pulled pork, shaved ham, Swiss cheese, house-made pickles, and house mustard blend on a grilled hoagie roll.
notes: Served with French fries, house salad, or cup of soup ($2).

name: Mary Moo
description: Red and golden beets, seasonal mushrooms, caramelized onions, heirloom tomatoes, spinach, walnut-herb pesto, and chevre in a flour tortilla.
notes: (V). Served with French fries, house salad, or a cup of soup ($2).

name: Kids Traditional
description: 1 plain pancake with syrup, 1 slab bacon, and 1 egg served their way.

name: Kids Pancake
description: Kid-sized buttermilk pancake with house syrup.
notes: Sub a specialty pancake $2. Available GF $1.

name: Kids Scramble
description: 1 egg (served their way) with smoked mozzarella and hashbrowns.
notes: Great upsell — add bacon or ham.

name: Kids Grilled Cheese Sandwich
description: House-made country toast with smoked mozzarella cheese. Served with French fries.
notes: Lunch (Mon-Fri 11:30-3pm). Great upsell — add ham or bacon.

name: Kids Chicken Strips
description: Three chicken strips served with French fries.

name: Kids P.B. and Jam Sandwich
description: House-made country toast with house-made peanut butter sauce and strawberry jam. Served with French fries.

name: Tortillas Sourcing
description: Corn-flour tortillas come from Trevino's in Billings, MT.

name: Gluten-Free Toast Sourcing
description: Gluten-free toast comes from Sisters Gluten Free Bakery in Belgrade, MT.

name: Hashbrowns Sourcing
description: Hashbrowns come from Bausch Potato Inc. in Whitehall, MT.

name: Pork Breakfast Sausage Sourcing
description: Pork breakfast sausage comes from Daniels Gourmet Meats in Bozeman, MT.

name: English Muffins Sourcing
description: Local English muffins. Gluten-free English muffins come from Furrow and Fly in Belgrade, MT.

name: Coffee Sourcing
description: Drip and espresso coffee come from Rockford in Bozeman, MT. Style: Medium Roast Guatemalan Blend.

name: Pepsi Products
description: We carry Pepsi products.

name: Fresh Brewed Iced Tea
description: Fresh brewed iced tea.

name: Arnold Palmer
description: Half iced tea, half lemonade.

name: Chocolate Milk
description: Chocolate milk.

name: White Milk
description: White milk.

description: Fresh squeezed orange juice.

description: Fresh squeezed grapefruit juice.

description: Fresh squeezed orange and grapefruit juice mixed.

description: Cranberry juice.

description: Apple juice.

name: Pineapple Juice
description: Pineapple juice.

name: Tomato Juice
description: Tomato juice.

name: Clamato
description: Clamato (tomato and clam juice blend).

name: Lemonade
description: Lemonade.

name: Espresso
description: Dark roast, full flavored. 2 shots.

name: Cafe Au Lait
description: Drip coffee and steamed milk. 16oz.

name: Americano
description: Espresso and hot water.

name: Macchiato
description: Espresso marked with a small dollop of micro foam. Shot glass 4.5 oz.

name: Starbucks Macchiato
description: Caramel sauce, vanilla syrup, espresso, steamed whole milk, and whipped cream.

name: Latte
description: Espresso and steamed milk.

name: Breve
description: Espresso and steamed half-and-half.

name: Cappuccino
description: Espresso, steamed milk, and micro foam. 8oz.

name: Cortado
description: Espresso and 2oz of steamed milk to 125°F. Shot glass 4.5 oz.

name: Bee Sting
description: Espresso, honey, cinnamon, and half-and-half, iced. 8oz.

name: Mocha
description: Espresso, Ghirardelli ground dark chocolate, and steamed milk.

name: White Chocolate Mocha
description: White chocolate powder and steamed milk.

name: Chai Latte
description: Oregon Chai, cinnamon, and steamed milk.

name: Dirty Chai Latte
description: Espresso, steamed milk, cinnamon, and real Vermont maple syrup.

name: Maple Latte
description: Espresso, steamed milk, and real Vermont maple syrup. 16oz.

name: Tea Latte
description: Choice of Steep Mountain loose-leaf tea and steamed milk. 16oz.

name: London Fog
description: Earl Grey tea latte with vanilla syrup and steamed milk.

name: Hot Cocoa
description: Ghirardelli ground dark chocolate and steamed milk, topped with whipped cream.

name: Steamer
description: Choice of flavor syrup and steamed milk.

name: Matcha Latte
description: Green tea powder, honey, and steamed milk.

name: Cold Brew Coffee
description: House-brewed concentrate served over ice.

name: Milk Options
description: Standard milks: whole, half-and-half, skim. Alternative milks: soy, oat, coconut, almond.

name: Flavor Syrup Options
description: Available syrups: vanilla, sugar-free vanilla, hazelnut, caramel, chocolate, white chocolate, real Vermont maple syrup.

name: English Breakfast
description: Caffeinated black tea.

name: Crème De La Earl Grey
description: Caffeinated black tea.

name: Genmaicha
description: Caffeinated green tea with toasted rice.

name: Ginger Peach
description: Caffeinated black tea with ginger and peach.

name: Jamming Spring Special
description: Caffeinated green tea, seasonal special.

name: Geyser Basin Green
description: Caffeinated green tea.

name: Matcha
description: Caffeinated powdered green tea.

name: Vanilla Rooibos
description: Herbal tea, caffeine-free.

name: Big Sky Blend
description: Herbal tea, caffeine-free.

name: Chamomile
description: Herbal tea, caffeine-free.

name: Storm Castle Chai
description: Herbal chai blend, caffeine-free.

name: Peppermint
description: Herbal tea, caffeine-free.

name: Bloody Mary
description: House-made bloody Mary mix and house-infused vodka.

name: Fun Bucket
description: A bottle of our house Italian Prosecco.

name: Mimosa
description: House Italian Prosecco and your choice of any juice.
notes: Available sm/lg. Upgrade to Cremant Brut $10 or Brut Rosé $14.

name: Jameosa
description: House Italian Prosecco mixed with fresh-squeezed orange and grapefruit juice.

name: Blushing Mimosa
description: House Italian Prosecco, fresh orange juice, pineapple juice, and Bordeaux cherry juice. Garnished with rosemary sprig.

name: G-Funk Mimosa
description: House Italian Prosecco, fresh grapefruit juice, and elderflower syrup. Garnished with rosemary sprig.

name: Huckleberry Lemonade
description: House Italian Prosecco, huckleberry syrup, and lemonade. Garnished with a lemon wedge.

name: Beermosa
description: Pilsner and freshly squeezed orange juice. Can be made with other craft beer.

name: Red Beer
description: Pilsner and house tomato bloody mary mix.

name: Moomosa
description: Strange Cattle IPA and fresh-squeezed orange juice.

name: Paloma
description: Wine-based tequila, fresh grapefruit juice, and a splash of 7-Up. Garnished with a lime wedge.

name: Corkscrew-Driver
description: Wine-based vodka and fresh-squeezed orange juice. Garnished with an orange slice.

name: Jam Sangria
description: Red wine, brandy, wine-based tequila, fresh-squeezed orange juice, and Bordeaux cherry juice. Garnished with an orange slice and Bordeaux cherry.

name: Irish Coffee
description: Drip coffee and Irish cream.

name: Irish Chai Latte
description: Oregon Chai, steamed milk, and Irish cream.

name: Bozone Amber Ale
description: Bozeman Brewing (Bozeman, MT). A light amber ale with a medium malt body gently balanced by a hint of hops for a clean, refreshing finish. Dry hopped with Cascade for a pleasant aroma.

name: Bavik Pilsner
description: Brewery De Brabandere (Bavikhove, Belgium). More hops than a lager, but lighter than a pale ale.

name: Strange Cattle IPA
description: Map Brewery (Bozeman, MT). New England-style IPA with bursts of pineapple and stone fruits complementing the complex, juicy flavor.

name: Fiesta Select Mexican Lager
description: Bozeman Brewing (Bozeman, MT). Crushable, clean-finishing beer with a hint of corn. 5% ABV.

name: Huckleberry Hopped Kombucha (N/A)
description: Happy Mountain Kombucha Co., Portland, OR. Non-alcoholic.

name: Seasonal Rotator
description: Rotating seasonal beer.

name: Coors Light
description: Coors Light, 12 oz.

name: Free Wave Non-Alcoholic Hazy IPA
description: Free Wave non-alcoholic Hazy IPA, 12 oz.

name: House White – Quadrum White Blend
description: Quadrum White Blend (Spain). 30% Sauvignon Blanc, 70% Verdejo.

name: La Bella Prosecco
description: Sparkling. Veneto, Italy.

name: Gerard Bertrand Cremant Brut
description: Sparkling. Limoux, France.

name: Cavicchioli 1928 Sparkling Rosé
description: Sparkling rosé. Emilia-Romagna, Italy.

name: Jean-Luc Colombo Rosé
description: Rosé. Cornas, France.
